query: Create a CLI tool that takes a directory path as a command-line argument and displays a list of file sizes inside it
expected_behavior: Phase 1 generates .advisor/<run-id>/01_requirements.md with scope clarified (recursive vs non-recursive, output format, error behavior)
Phase 2 generates .advisor/<run-id>/02_design.md containing language selection rationale and alternatives
Phase 3 generates .advisor/<run-id>/03_impl_plan.md with tasks topologically sorted and depends_on fields populated
Phase 4 generates implementation code and test files, with test execution exiting with code 0
Each phase's review files (.advisor/<run-id>/<phase>_review_*.json) are valid JSON with a verdict field of either LGTM or NEEDS_FIX
All phases conclude with LGTM verdicts and run.sh exits with code 0
